form.formComment: Comes here off a 36-day let-up. Last start ran last in a small field at this track on March 5 over 1673m, 114 len behind Letsgetluckytonite with 55kg at $7.30. Before that second last of 8 at Laurel on January 17 over 1609m, 18 len behind Happy Jaunt carrying 57kg at $9.80. Can bounce back.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months won by a nose at this track March 20 over 1710m defeating Jake's Affection with 55.5kg at $3.60. Previously second-up second last in a small field at Presque Isle Downs on June 24 over 1710m, 4.5 len behind Major Mischief carrying 55.5kg at $19.60. Impossible to knock and looks the one again. Improver with winning prospects.
